creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192934
Patch adding a new games/coffeebreak port (version: 0.1.1)

coffeebreak is a port of coffeescript.sh by Devin Teske.

It basically fakes the FreeBSD installer.

QA:
 - portlint -AC
 - poudriere testport 10.4 amd64
 - runs and installs fine on my 12.0-CURRENT amd64 laptop
